extortion.description: Sermo is an exclusive online community for licensed physicians, offering a platform for peer-to-peer collaboration, medical crowdsourcing, and real-time discussion of clinical cases. Sermo provides healthcare professionals with tools to connect globally, share insights, and improve patient care through collective knowledge.Sermo's corporate office is located at 3 Times Square, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10036, United States, and has 450+ employees.
